title: UFO Crash Retrieval with Whistleblower Jake Barber #aliens #ufo

transcript.text: have you retrieved a non-human craft we
recovered an egg and we just call it the
egg cuz that's what it was it was a
surprise to everyone and it was obvious
to everyone that what we were dealing
with was something extraordinary my job
that night was as a helicopter pilot I
was not on the ground I was called in to
transport that egg through a long line
150 ft that hangs below the helicopter
it has a remote hook on it that remote
hook can be attached to Hardware that
secures the load did you see this egg I
saw it absolutely saw what it look like
it's probably 20 ft plus or minus
hovered right over it hooked up to it 20
ft longitudinally this is at at night at
this point there was enough lunar
illumination that I could see it with
the Naked Eyes and somebody wrapped Nets
around it somebody on your team yeah
someone on the ground too and did they
sort of touch the craft while they were
wrapping Nest the team there must have
touched it yeah
